final:
module Counter4bit (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
